channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nicola Coughlan confirms limited role in Bridgerton season five as filming begins
item.description: Nicola Coughlan, known for her role as Penelope Featherington in the popular Netflix series Bridgerton, has stated that she will have a reduced presence in the forthcoming fifth season. The actress, w...

item.title: Pakistan and China Strengthen Cooperation through Joint Ventures and MoUs
item.description: During President Asif Ali Zardari’s ongoing visit to China, Pakistan and China have formalised a joint venture agreement along with two MoUs, aiming to enhance practical cooperation in key sectors. Th...

item.title: Miss Universe Philippines 2026: Highlights from the Final Competition and Coronation Night
item.description: The Miss Universe Philippines 2026 pageant concluded its much-anticipated final competition and coronation night on May 2, 2026. The event featured some of the country’s most talented and inspiring wo...

item.title: Zaha Hadid Architects’ Pavilion 'Origin' Debuts at Milan Design Week 2026
item.description: Origin, a pavilion designed by Zaha Hadid Architects and commissioned by Audi for Milan Design Week 2026, stands in the courtyard of a former 16th-century seminary, creating a striking visual contrast...

item.title: Ishaq Dar Holds Phone Talks with Kuwaiti Foreign Minister on Middle East Developments and Economic Impacts
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar spoke on Saturday with Kuwait’s Foreign Minister Sheikh Jarrah Jaber Al-Ahmad Al-Sabah about the current regional situation in the Middle East and ...

item.title: FBR lodges FIR against Karachi pharma firm directors over alleged Rs7.5bn money laundering through non-profit trust
item.description: The Federal Board of Revenue has filed a money laundering case against five directors of a prominent Karachi-based pharmaceutical company. According to the FIR, the directors allegedly used the accoun...

item.title: Carney’s Diplomatic Visit to Armenia Amid Rising U.S. Trade Tensions
item.description: Prime Minister Carney is embarking on a diplomatic visit to Armenia where he will meet with European leaders amidst growing trade tensions between Canada and the United States. This move comes at a ti...

item.title: 37-Year Struggle Over Alphington Bike Path Finally Reaches Resolution
item.description: What began as a small idea in a 2002 Melway street directory has turned into a 37-year saga over the construction of a cycling and walking path in Melbourne's Alphington. The path, proposed in the 198...

item.title: Prime Minister Directs Authorities to Release Motorcycles and Vehicles Seized for Minor Traffic Offences
item.description: Dodoma — In a move aimed at protecting the livelihoods of many young Tanzanians, Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba has instructed authorities to stop holding motorcycles, tricycles and other transport...

item.title: Producer price inflation rises to 2.3% in March on higher food and fuel costs
item.description: According to the latest data from Stats SA, South Africa's annual producer inflation accelerated to 2.3% in March from 1.8% the previous month. This uptick was mainly driven by increases in food produ...

item.title: PTI affirms Sohail Afridi continues as Khyber Pakhtunkhwa Chief Minister
item.description: In a recent statement from Peshawar, PTI Chairman Barrister Gohar Ali Khan confirmed that Sohail Afridi will continue serving as the Chief Minister of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa. He clarified that Afridi was ...

item.title: Chinese Coast Guard Monitors Philippine Civilian Ship in West Philippine Sea
item.description: On the morning of May 1, 2026, a Chinese Coast Guard vessel was observed trailing the Philippine civilian mission ship, M/V Kapitan Felix Oca, near Mindoro. The Atin Ito mission, aimed at delivering f...

item.title: US Issues Sanctions Warning Over Payments to Iran for Strait of Hormuz Passage
item.description: The United States has issued a stern warning to shipping companies that any payments made to Iran for safe passage through the strategic Strait of Hormuz could result in sanctions. The alert, released...

item.title: Air Peace Gatwick–Lagos Flight Cancelled Due to Bird Strike, Passengers Raise Concerns
item.description: Passengers wey dey fly from London Gatwick go Lagos with Air Peace don complain well-well after one bird waka enter plane way cause wahala. The airline talk say na safety protocol make dem ground the ...

item.title: Beauden Barrett's penalty secures dramatic win for Blues over Reds after late error
item.description: In a thrilling Super Rugby Pacific match, the Blues managed to overcome a significant setback when Beauden Barrett made a costly error late in the game. The veteran playmaker, who has been a key figur...

item.title: Adeboye Confirms Remi Tinubu Remains RCCG Pastor, Explains Church Gift Handling
item.description: Pastor Enoch Adeboye, the General Overseer of the Redeemed Christian Church of God (RCCG), don clarify say Nigeria’s First Lady, Oluremi Tinubu, go remain an ordained pastor for the church. Adeboye ta...

item.title: Conflict in Iran may disrupt British food imports
item.description: Rising tensions and military conflict in Iran are expected to impact the supply of key food products imported to the United Kingdom. Analysts warn that disruptions in Iran’s agricultural exports, part...

item.title: AFP Provides Support for Civilian Mission Delivering Supplies to Pag-asa Island
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) announced it will assist a civilian-led initiative, the Atin Ito Coalition, to ensure safe passage for their fourth mission, 'Balik Pag-asa,' to Pag-asa Islan...

item.title: Supreme Court Overturns Duterte Admin’s Dismissal of Carandang from Ombudsman Post
item.description: The Supreme Court has reversed the decision of the Duterte administration to dismiss Melchor Arthur Carandang as Deputy Ombudsman. Carandang was dismissed in 2018 after investigating former President ...

item.title: Simba Wins Union Cup After Intense Midfield Battle Against Young Africans
item.description: The 2026 Union Cup final in Dar es Salaam between Simba SC and Young Africans SC was intense and physical, with the midfield dominating the game from start to finish. Simba SC had relied on a patient ...
